testsuite.name: s2s.country

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 100.0 ✅ Boundary amount provided explicitly: 100.0 Generated First Name: johnb81 Generated Email: nairobiPalermoe0786@gmail.com Purchase created successfully with ID: 6981e4e2b0f4598c7a555bea Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment succeeded as expected Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6981e4e2b0f4598c7a555bea Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null country accepted by API: IN

testsuite.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- EUR select merchant name :- VISA Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Amount Inputs → Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Provided: 100.0 ✅ Boundary amount provided explicitly: 100.0 Generated First Name: johnb81 Generated Email: nairobiPalermoe0786@gmail.com Purchase created successfully with ID: 6981e4e2b0f4598c7a555bea Redirected URL: https://staging.paysecure.net/getResponse.jsp?issucces=true Payment succeeded as expected Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6981e4e2b0f4598c7a555bea Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null country accepted by API: IN
